title: HNLMS Rotterdam
summary:
HNLMS Rotterdam (Dutch: Hr.Ms. or Zr.Ms. Rotterdam) may refer to following ships of the Royal Netherlands Navy:

Dutch ship Rotterdam (1695), a 52-gun fourth rate ship of the line of the Dutch States Navy
HNLMS Rotterdam (D818), a Friesland-class destroyer
HNLMS Rotterdam (L800), a landing platform dock
text:
HNLMS Rotterdam (Dutch: Hr.Ms. or Zr.Ms. Rotterdam) may refer to following ships of the Royal Netherlands Navy:

Dutch ship Rotterdam (1695), a 52-gun fourth rate ship of the line of the Dutch States Navy
HNLMS Rotterdam (D818), a Friesland-class destroyer
HNLMS Rotterdam (L800), a landing platform dock
